positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central composition featuring stylized cosmic flora and fauna. Depict glowing nebulae swirling around geometric mandalas, intertwined with elegant, bioluminescent vines and crystalline geometric shapes. The style is neo-vintage scientific illustration meets Art Deco symmetry. Use deep indigo, vibrant emerald green, electric turquoise, and subtle gold foil accents. Strong emphasis on clean, crisp lines, perfect negative space, and high contrast. The overall composition must look like a seamless, isolated emblem suitable for direct apparel printing, ensuring sharp edges and clear silhouettes.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, artist name, blur, blurry, noisy, grainy, artifacts, low resolution, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed, deformed, jpeg artifacts, cross-pollination, gradient skin tones
